findings.summary: No fiducials on F.Cu (146 SMD components) (finest pad dim 0.00mm — BGA/fine-pitch QFN present)
findings.description: F.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 146 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
findings.recommendation: Add fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment (3 per side with SMD).

findings.summary: Orientation: 31 passives on F.Cu deviate from 0 deg majority
findings.description: 31 of 103 passives on F.Cu are not at the majority 0 deg orientation.
findings.recommendation: Align passive component orientations for consistent pick-and-place.

findings.description: Component J3 on F.Cu is only 0.23mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move J3 further from board edge (currently 0.23mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)
